payload.answer: mem_new was returned because it represents the current valid state of Sam's affiliation with Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded—a durable memory system must not present deleted or outdated facts as current information. The filtering preserves data integrity by ensuring only non-superseded memories appear in recall results.
citations: Memory system principle: never present superseded facts as current
Recall filtering rule: exclude memories marked with supersession status
Entity resolution: prefer newer memory card when supersession relationship exists
payload.decision: mem_new retained, mem_old filtered as superseded

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new contains current authoritative information; mem_old marked as superseded and filtered from recall results

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering decision for Sam from Goldman

details: Superseded memory (mem_old) correctly filtered from recall
Ambiguity preserved: no conflicting claims presented

repair_options: Verify mem_new accuracy before committing as authoritative
Document reason for supersession in mem_old metadata
Audit entity resolution to confirm Sam identity consistency
